title: Moar Lighters
description: more lighter skins for Create: Diesel Generators
body:
Mod is for Create: Diesel Generators

Currently has:

- Lightners Lighter: Made by naming a lighter "Lightner" in an anvil

- Gun Lighter: Made by naming a lighter "Gun" in an anvil

- Shiny Lighter: Made by naming a lighter "Shiny" in an anvil

- Secret Lighter: Hint: Overused metal

Tested on 1.19.2 with Create: Diesel Generators version 1.2d but should work with any Minecraft version C:DG is on
